results.title: Four men sent to Crown Court, including 2 allegedly caught in hotel room with child
results.description: Four men have had their cases sent to crown court after appearing before Blackburn Magistrates' Court

results.title: How I was not paid for role I played — Bisola Omobolanle
results.description: By Ayo Onikoyi Fast-rising Nollywood actress Olaide Bisola Omobolanle, popularly known as Nicebody4real, has opened up on one of the most difficult experiences she has faced since joining the Nigerian movie industry, revealing that she once spent over a month on a film set without receiving any payment for her role. The Ogun State-born actress, [...] The post How I was not paid for role I played — Bisola Omobolanle appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: Bolton road to close for more than a week for electricity works tomorrow
results.description: Motorists are being urged to plan ahead as a Bolton road is set to close for more than a week to allow electricity works to be carried out.

results.title: Iran Claims It Shot Down US MQ-9 Drone Over Ahvaz
results.description: (MENAFN) Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said it downed a US MQ-9 drone over the southwestern city of Ahvaz on Sunday, according to reports.The claim has not been confirmed by US ...

results.title: Microsoft Releases KB5121767 Emergency Update for Dell PCs
results.description: Emergency Windows 11 Update KB5121767 fixes an Intel driver compatibility issue affecting a limited number of Dell computers running Windows 11. Microsoft released the out-of-band update after recent Patch Tuesday updates caused problems with Intel’s Innovation Platform Framework driver. KB5121767 also includes all previous security and non-security improvements. Microsoft Blocked the July 2026 Update Microsoft [...]

results.title: Paresh Rawal Breaks Silence on OMG 2 Controversy, Seeks Idea Credit Not Money
results.description: Paresh Rawal has clarified the controversy surrounding OMG 2, saying he has no disagreement with Akshay Kumar. The veteran actor says he only wanted recognition for the original story idea and never sought money or writing credit

results.title: Goa declares 1.02 crore sq m of eco-sensitive land as No Development Zone
results.description: The Goa government has declared 1.02 crore square metres of ecologically sensitive land as a No Development Zone to protect paddy fields, slopes and low-lying areas. The move aims to curb unregulated construction and preserve the state's ecological balance

results.title: "Be Kind To Her": Samay Raina Defends 'Man Hater' Sakshi Jha After Viral Latent Controversy
results.description: Samay Raina has requested his fans to be kind to Sakshi Jha.

results.title: ‘Batwara 1947’ Teaser Out: Sunny Deol Back in Action Against the Horrors of Partition in Rajkumar Santoshi’s Epic
results.description: The marketing campaign for the highly anticipated period drama Batwara 1947 has taken a major leap forward with the release of its official second teaser. Directed by National Award-winning filmmaker Rajkumar Santoshi and headlined by Sunny Deol, the new footage provides a deeply visceral look into the brutal, chaotic backdrop of India’s Partition. results.title: Amitabh Bachchan on Argentina vs Spain World Cup 2026 final: ‘Competition between coaches’
results.description: Ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Argentina and Spain, Amitabh Bachchan shared his thoughts on the match, saying the title would be decided not by individual brilliance but by the tactical acumen of the two coaches.

results.title: A better Bangladesh for all
results.description: Prime Minister Tarique Rahman’s assurance that no one will be left behind in building a new Bangladesh is definitely a powerful commitment, and one that must be heeded. This is a statement that carries particular weight for our nation’s minority population, who have too often lived at the margins of development, protection, and political attention. results.description: (Photo credit: Gary A. Vasquez-Imagn Images) Tarik Skubal scattered five hits over seven innings and Spencer Torkelson homered twice and drove in four runs to lead the Detroit Tigers to a 7-0 victory over the Los Angeles Angels on Saturday night in Anaheim, Calif.
